programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: After training with his demon boss Liz, Akutsu gains confidence and sets out to corrupt Lily. As they battle in charm, Lily makes a desperate move.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Lily, sleepless after last night with Akutsu, dozes off in class. He appears in her romance game dream—could this be her chance to win him over?

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: At the hideout, Guel was taken prisoner by Olcott. Having killed his father, Guel remains sunk in deep despair. ......

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Due to the incident, the school was in chaos. Miorine returns to school after a long hiatus from the hearing.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Miorine decides to take over the Quiet Zero project in exchange for Suletta's release.

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: Nishikata is thrilled when Takagi-san invites him to walk a dog with her. Will he be able to hide his joy?

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: Nishikata invites Takagi-san to take a side trip after school. Will Nishikata win by chatting to distract Takagi-san?

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: Nishikata and Takagi-san go to play a claw machine before going to the movies. Can Nishikata get a prize first?

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno learns why Fukurōdani has one of the top volleyball teams in Tokyo.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno come up against Ougiminami High. And there's a confrontation between Hinata and Yoshiki Towada in the bathroom.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: After training with his demon boss Liz, Akutsu gains confidence and sets out to corrupt Lily. As they battle in charm, Lily makes a desperate move.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Lily, sleepless after last night with Akutsu, dozes off in class. He appears in her romance game dream—could this be her chance to win him over?

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: On White Day, Shiraishi recalls that he received a chocolate gift on Valentine's Day, so he finds Kubo and….

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: One day, Shiraishi's lost his handkerchief. A girl behind picks it up and calls out to him. She's Kubo's little sister.

programme.desc: Karasuno learns why Fukurōdani has one of the top volleyball teams in Tokyo.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Kotoko finds out the real murderer. Muroi is able to get rid of the accusation but he has to face a cruel truth.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Rikka moves out from Kotoko and Kuro. As she doesn't have any guarantor, she rents a room that has a grisly history.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno come up against Ougiminami High. And there's a confrontation between Hinata and Yoshiki Towada in the bathroom.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno's next opponent is Kakugawa, a volleyball team that has a player who is 201cm tall.

programme.desc: Nishikata and Takagi-san go to play a claw machine before going to the movies. Can Nishikata get a prize first?

programme.title: TEASING MASTER TAKAGI-SAN SEASON 3
programme.desc: Nishikata and Takagi-san make their first shrine visit to make wishes, and they have their first competition this year.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: After her mysterious death, Rinko is reincarnated into Raeliana, a character in a novel destined to be killed.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana goes to the duke's mansion to seal a deal with Noah, but he seems unfazed by the trump card she plays.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana moves to live with Noah to receive domestic arts training, but they find it difficult to pretend to be in love.

programme.desc: Raeliana and Noah arrive at the ball, and Noah asks Raeliana to get an invitation to the noble ladies' gathering.
